structure.level_2: Parent tasks shown on the workplan dashboard
structure.level_3: Checklist items nested inside parent tasks
structure.evidence_model: Grouped evidence pack, with individual evidence items nested inside each evidence group

parent_tasks.title: Confirm GIR applicability, legal basis and deadline
checklist: Confirm whether a GIR filing obligation exists for the jurisdiction and fiscal year
Confirm whether this is a first-year / transitional filing period
Confirm whether any local extensions, transitional rules or administrative concessions apply
Mark obligation status: applies, does not apply, monitor only, or awaiting confirmation

parent_tasks.title: Confirm GIR filing entity and filing route
checklist: Confirm filing entity: UPE, designated filing entity, local constituent entity, or other authorised entity
Confirm whether the GIR will be filed locally, centrally, or through exchange of information
Confirm whether the local jurisdiction accepts GIR information through exchange
Confirm whether domestic filing is still required
Confirm fallback filing requirement if exchange is unavailable, delayed, incomplete, or rejected
Confirm whether a designated filing entity appointment or authorisation is required
Confirm who has authority to approve and submit the filing

parent_tasks.title: Confirm entity and jurisdiction scope
checklist: Confirm jurisdictions covered by the GIR
Reconcile entity list to legal entity master data and group structure chart

parent_tasks.title: Confirm GIR schema, format and submission requirements
checklist: Confirm local filing format: XML, portal form, PDF, local return, or other format
Confirm whether pre-submission validation is available or required

parent_tasks.title: Map GIR data requirements to source systems and owners
checklist: Map GIR data fields to source systems
Identify data fields sourced from CbCR
Identify data fields sourced from consolidated financial statements
Identify data fields sourced from local statutory accounts
Identify data fields sourced from tax provision files
Identify data fields sourced from legal entity management systems
Identify data fields sourced from local tax teams
Identify gaps, manual inputs and judgement areas

parent_tasks.title: Collect GIR source data
checklist: Track missing, late or incomplete responses

parent_tasks.title: Validate and reconcile GIR data
checklist: Reconcile GIR inputs to consolidated financial statements
Reconcile GIR inputs to local statutory accounts, where relevant
Reconcile GIR inputs to tax provision files
Reconcile GIR inputs to QDMTT calculations

parent_tasks.title: Confirm safe harbour, QDMTT, IIR and UTPR interactions
checklist: Confirm safe harbour disclosures required in the GIR
Confirm whether elections or designations affect the GIR
Cross-reference to safe harbour assessment workflow
Cross-reference to QDMTT / IIR / UTPR workflows

parent_tasks.title: Prepare GIR data pack and filing output
checklist: Prepare XML, portal file, local form, or other submission format

parent_tasks.title: Complete technical review and final approval
checklist: Confirm reviewer has access to data pack and reconciliations
Confirm open issues have been resolved or escalated
Confirm final filing version is locked

parent_tasks.title: Submit GIR and monitor filing status
Archive GIR evidence pack
checklist: Confirm all required evidence has been uploaded
Confirm final filed version is stored

items: Legal source extract or local adviser confirmation
First-year / transitional filing analysis, where relevant
Local extension, concession or administrative guidance support, where relevant
Designated filing entity appointment or authorisation
Local domestic filing requirement analysis, where relevant
PE / JV / investment entity / minority-owned entity analysis
Local statutory account reconciliation, where relevant
Tax provision file reconciliation, where relevant
Group Pillar 2 model reconciliation, where relevant
Safe harbour support and disclosure cross-reference
Local top-up tax interaction analysis, where relevant
Unresolved issue / limitation memo, where relevant
Amendment or correction memo, if relevant

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if exchange route is being relied on but local domestic filing may still be required
Alert if local jurisdiction requires notification even where GIR is filed elsewhere
Alert if GIR schema version differs from group default
Alert if safe harbour conclusion has not been approved before GIR preparation
Alert if QDMTT data differs from GIR data
Add local checklist item if jurisdiction requires local language filing
Add local checklist item if tax authority portal requires prior registration

parent_tasks.title: Confirm QDMTT applicability, legal basis and deadline
checklist: Confirm whether local DMTT / QDMTT applies for the fiscal year
Confirm whether local legislation is enacted, draft, conditional, elective, or subject to thresholds

parent_tasks.title: Confirm local filing entity, liable entity and filing route
checklist: Confirm whether liability is joint, several, allocated, or entity-specific
Confirm whether return is standalone, combined with another top-up tax return, or part of a corporate tax filing
Confirm portal, form, signatory and tax agent requirements
Confirm whether local registration is required before filing

parent_tasks.title: Confirm local QDMTT entity scope
checklist: Confirm whether local grouping differs from GIR grouping
Reconcile local QDMTT scope to GIR scope

parent_tasks.title: Map and collect QDMTT data
checklist: Identify local differences from GIR data requirements
Collect financial, tax, ownership and entity data
Track missing or incomplete local data

parent_tasks.title: Prepare and reconcile QDMTT calculation
checklist: Confirm allocation of liability among local entities

parent_tasks.title: Confirm QDMTT safe harbour and local deviations
checklist: Confirm whether local rule has qualified or transitional qualified status
Confirm whether QDMTT safe harbour treatment is available
Confirm whether QDMTT safe harbour is being claimed
Identify local deviations from standard GloBE rules
Document effect of local deviations on calculation

parent_tasks.title: Prepare QDMTT return
checklist: Confirm language, currency and signatory requirements

parent_tasks.title: Complete QDMTT technical review and approval
checklist: Obtain local adviser review, where required

parent_tasks.title: Submit QDMTT return and trigger payment workflow
checklist: Trigger payment workflow, if payment is due

parent_tasks.title: Monitor assessments, queries and amendments
checklist: Link to amendment workflow if required

parent_tasks.title: Archive QDMTT evidence pack
checklist: Confirm all required evidence has been uploaded
Confirm filed return and receipt are stored

items: Legal source extract or local adviser confirmation
Enacted / draft / conditional legislation status support
Local adoption or transitional qualified status support
QDMTT safe harbour claim support, where relevant
QDMTT safe harbour non-reliance memo, where relevant

evidence_pack.group: Filing route, filing entity and liability
items: Tax agent or representative support, where relevant
PE / JV / investment entity / minority-owned entity inclusion analysis
Local law interpretation memo, where relevant
Local adviser technical note, where relevant
Treatment of tax credits, deferred taxes and local elections

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if QDMTT qualification status is uncertain
Alert if local QDMTT data differs from GIR data
Alert if payment deadline differs from filing deadline
Alert if return is combined with IIR / UTPR / local top-up tax return
Add local checklist item if QDMTT must be calculated using local accounting standard
Add local checklist item if a tax agent or power of attorney is required

parent_tasks.title: Confirm GIR notification applicability, legal basis and deadline
checklist: Confirm whether notification is annual, one-off, event-driven, or required only when facts change

parent_tasks.title: Confirm notifying entity and GIR filing route
checklist: Confirm whether GIR will be filed by UPE, designated filing entity, local entity, or other entity
Confirm whether GIR is expected through exchange
Confirm whether local filing is still required
Confirm fallback if GIR is not exchanged successfully

parent_tasks.title: Confirm local entities and required notification scope
checklist: Confirm whether local constituent entities must be listed
Confirm whether PEs must be disclosed
Confirm whether JVs must be disclosed
Confirm whether investment entities must be disclosed
Confirm whether stateless entities must be disclosed
Reconcile entity list to GIR scope

parent_tasks.title: Collect notification data
Prepare GIR notification
checklist: Complete required form, portal data or letter
Attach local entity list, if required
Confirm consistency with GIR filing route
Confirm consistency with designated filing entity support

parent_tasks.title: Review and approve GIR notification
Submit GIR notification
checklist: Store portal receipt or email confirmation

parent_tasks.title: Monitor notification acceptance or corrections
checklist: Escalate if notification affects GIR filing route

parent_tasks.title: Archive GIR notification evidence pack
checklist: Confirm legal basis evidence is stored

items: Legal source extract or local adviser confirmation

evidence_pack.group: Notifying entity and GIR filing route
items: Local filing fallback support, where relevant
PE / JV / investment entity inclusion analysis
Stateless entity inclusion analysis, where relevant

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if notification is due before GIR filing
Alert if notification is required even though GIR is filed centrally
Alert if the notifying entity differs from the local filing or payment entity
Add local checklist item if notification is required only when facts change
Add local checklist item if notification must include all local constituent entities

parent_tasks.title: Confirm registration requirement, legal basis and deadline
checklist: Confirm whether registration is required before filing, payment, notification, or only on request

parent_tasks.title: Confirm registering entity and registration route
checklist: Confirm registering entity: UPE, local entity, tax agent, representative, or group-level registrant
Confirm whether entity already has local tax ID
Confirm whether entity already has portal account
Confirm whether new Pillar 2 tax account is required
Confirm whether local representative is required
Confirm whether tax agent appointment is required

parent_tasks.title: Collect registration information and authorisations
checklist: Collect beneficial ownership or group details, where required
Collect tax agent details, where required
Obtain power of attorney, where required
Obtain board resolution or delegation of authority, where required

parent_tasks.title: Prepare registration submission
checklist: Prepare registration form or portal submission
Confirm no passwords are stored in evidence pack

parent_tasks.title: Review and approve registration submission
Submit registration and obtain access
checklist: Store new tax ID or account confirmation
Escalate if registration may block filing or payment

parent_tasks.title: Test portal access and monitor processing
checklist: Confirm ability to file, pay or amend, where relevant

parent_tasks.title: Archive registration evidence pack
checklist: Confirm registration source evidence is stored
Confirm registration data pack is stored
Confirm access test evidence is stored

items: Legal source extract or local adviser confirmation
Existing tax ID / portal account check
New tax ID / Pillar 2 account requirement support
Board resolution or delegation of authority
Beneficial ownership or group information support, where relevant
Registration rejection / clarification log, where relevant
New tax ID / Pillar 2 account confirmation
Filing / payment access test confirmation, where relevant

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if registration is required before filing
Alert if registration is required before payment
Alert if tax agent appointment or power of attorney is required
Alert if portal access has not been tested
Add local checklist item if registration lead time exceeds internal filing timetable

parent_tasks.title: Confirm additional local reporting requirement and deadline
checklist: Confirm whether the jurisdiction requires an additional local information report
Confirm whether report is in addition to or instead of another filing

parent_tasks.title: Confirm reporting entity and submission route
checklist: Confirm portal, form, email, paper or other submission route

parent_tasks.title: Confirm report scope
checklist: Confirm whether report applies to the group, local entity, PE, JV, or specific entity category
Confirm whether report overlaps with GIR
Confirm whether report overlaps with QDMTT, IIR or UTPR return

parent_tasks.title: Map and collect local report data
checklist: Identify overlap with local statutory accounts
Identify data fields that differ from group model

parent_tasks.title: Reconcile local report data to GIR and local sources
checklist: Reconcile to QDMTT / IIR / UTPR calculations, where relevant

parent_tasks.title: Prepare local information report
Review and approve local information report
checklist: Complete local adviser review, where required

parent_tasks.title: Submit local information report
Monitor authority response or correction requests
checklist: Link to amendment workflow if needed

parent_tasks.title: Archive local report evidence pack

items: Legal source extract or local adviser confirmation
Portal / form / email / paper filing support

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if report is due before GIR or local return
Alert if local report uses different data definitions from GIR
Alert if language translation is required
Add local checklist item if report must be filed by a local tax agent

parent_tasks.title: Confirm IIR applicability, legal basis and deadline
checklist: Confirm whether the jurisdiction has implemented an IIR
Confirm whether the IIR applies to the group for the fiscal year
Confirm whether the IIR has qualified or transitional qualified status

parent_tasks.title: Confirm IIR filing entity and return route
checklist: Confirm whether filing entity is UPE, IPE, POPE, or other parent entity

parent_tasks.title: Confirm parent entity status and ownership chain
checklist: Confirm whether intermediate parent rules apply
Confirm whether partially owned parent rules apply
Confirm whether ownership changes occurred during the period
Reconcile ownership data to legal entity master data

parent_tasks.title: Identify IIR top-up tax exposure
checklist: Confirm whether top-up tax is allocated to the filing jurisdiction
Confirm whether QDMTT reduces IIR exposure
Confirm whether QDMTT safe harbour reduces IIR exposure
Confirm whether local top-up tax reduces IIR exposure
Confirm whether safe harbours eliminate or reduce IIR computations

parent_tasks.title: Collect IIR data and model outputs
Prepare and reconcile IIR calculation
Prepare IIR return
Review and approve IIR return
checklist: Obtain local adviser review, where relevant

parent_tasks.title: Submit IIR return and trigger payment workflow
checklist: Trigger payment workflow, if payment is due
Confirm payment reference and payment deadline

parent_tasks.title: Monitor assessments, queries and amendments
checklist: Link to amendment workflow if required

parent_tasks.title: Archive IIR evidence pack
checklist: Confirm all required evidence has been uploaded
Confirm filed return and receipt are stored

items: Legal source extract or local adviser confirmation

evidence_pack.group: Filing entity and parent entity status
items: Local return format and submission route support
Intermediate parent rule analysis, where relevant
Partially owned parent rule analysis, where relevant

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if parent entity status is uncertain
Alert if QDMTT data is not final
Alert if ownership changes occurred during the year
Alert if payment deadline differs from return deadline
Add local checklist item if IIR return is combined with another local top-up tax return

parent_tasks.title: Confirm UTPR applicability, legal basis and deadline
checklist: Confirm whether jurisdiction has implemented UTPR
Confirm whether UTPR applies for the fiscal year
Confirm whether UTPR has qualified or transitional qualified status
Confirm transitional UTPR relief, if relevant

parent_tasks.title: Confirm UTPR filing entity and submission route
Confirm local UTPR obligation and allocation basis
checklist: Confirm whether local entity is subject to UTPR filing obligation
Confirm whether local entity is subject to UTPR payment obligation
Confirm tangible asset allocation data required
Confirm local law deviations from standard allocation formula
Confirm whether local return is standalone or combined

parent_tasks.title: Identify residual top-up tax subject to UTPR
checklist: Identify low-taxed jurisdictions not fully taxed under IIR
Identify low-taxed jurisdictions not fully taxed under QDMTT

parent_tasks.title: Collect UTPR allocation data
Prepare and reconcile UTPR allocation calculation
checklist: Reconcile residual top-up tax to GIR
Reconcile residual top-up tax to group Pillar 2 model
Reconcile allocation factors to source data

parent_tasks.title: Prepare UTPR return
Review and approve UTPR return
checklist: Obtain local adviser review, where relevant

parent_tasks.title: Submit UTPR return and trigger payment workflow
checklist: Trigger payment workflow, if payment is due

parent_tasks.title: Monitor assessments, queries and amendments
checklist: Link to amendment workflow if required

checklist: Confirm all required evidence has been uploaded

items: Legal source extract or local adviser confirmation

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if IIR and QDMTT coverage are not final
Alert if employee or tangible asset data is incomplete
Alert if transitional UTPR relief may apply
Alert if UTPR amount is generated by another jurisdiction’s under-taxed profits
Add local checklist item if local law uses a modified allocation formula

parent_tasks.title: Confirm combined return requirement, components and deadline
checklist: Confirm whether jurisdiction requires a combined Pillar 2 / top-up tax return
Confirm components included: QDMTT, IIR, UTPR, GIR data, notification data, local disclosures, payment declaration

parent_tasks.title: Confirm filing entity, liable entities and submission route
checklist: Confirm whether liability differs by component

parent_tasks.title: Confirm entities and components in scope
checklist: Confirm PEs, JVs, investment entities and minority-owned entities
Confirm which components are not applicable
Confirm whether any components are optional or elective
Reconcile scope to GIR and local returns

parent_tasks.title: Map and collect combined return data
checklist: Map each return section to data source and owner

parent_tasks.title: Prepare component calculations and reconcile outputs
checklist: Reconcile combined return to group Pillar 2 model
Reconcile combined return to local statutory accounts
Reconcile combined return to payment calculation

parent_tasks.title: Prepare combined return
Review and approve combined return
checklist: Complete technical review for each component
Obtain local adviser review, where relevant

parent_tasks.title: Submit combined return and trigger payment workflow
checklist: Trigger payment workflow, if payment is due

parent_tasks.title: Monitor assessments, queries and amendments
checklist: Link to amendment workflow if required

parent_tasks.title: Archive combined return evidence pack
checklist: Confirm all component evidence is uploaded
Confirm filed return and receipt are stored

items: Legal source extract or local adviser confirmation
Component mapping: QDMTT / IIR / UTPR / disclosures / payment
PE / JV / investment entity / minority-owned entity analysis
GIR and local return scope reconciliation
Local top-up tax calculation support, where relevant

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if combined return includes a payment declaration
Alert if one component is ready but another is blocked
Alert if different components have different liable entities
Alert if safe harbour disclosure affects calculation sections
Add local checklist item if combined return replaces separate QDMTT / IIR / UTPR returns

parent_tasks.title: Confirm payment obligation, type and deadline
checklist: Confirm whether a Pillar 2 payment obligation exists
Classify payment type: estimated, instalment, final, balancing, amended, interest, penalty, or assessment payment
Confirm whether payment deadline differs from return deadline

parent_tasks.title: Confirm liable entity, paying entity and payment process
checklist: Confirm whether payment must be made by filing entity, local entity, tax agent, or another group entity
Confirm whether local bank account is required
Confirm whether payment reference is required
Confirm whether registration is required before payment

parent_tasks.title: Confirm payment amount source and funding requirements
checklist: Confirm whether withholding, bank charges or local restrictions apply

parent_tasks.title: Validate payment calculation and references
checklist: Validate payment amount to return or calculation
Verify bank details using approved source
Confirm no duplicate payment has been made
Confirm whether interest or penalties apply

parent_tasks.title: Obtain tax and treasury payment approvals
checklist: Confirm approval covers amount, currency, entity, beneficiary and value date

parent_tasks.title: Submit payment
checklist: Store tax authority receipt, if available
Notify filing owner that payment has been made

parent_tasks.title: Reconcile payment and monitor allocation
checklist: Track overpayment, refund, offset, underpayment, interest or penalty

parent_tasks.title: Archive payment evidence pack
checklist: Confirm tax authority receipt is stored

items: Legal source extract or local adviser confirmation
Return deadline versus payment deadline comparison

evidence_pack.group: Liable entity, paying entity and payment route
items: Tax agent payment support, where relevant
Withholding, bank charge or payment restriction analysis, where relevant
Approval record showing amount, currency, entity, beneficiary and value date
Failed payment / resubmission evidence, where relevant

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if payment deadline is before filing deadline
Alert if payment cannot be made until registration is complete
Alert if bank details have not been independently verified
Alert if payment currency differs from calculation currency
Alert if payment amount source is not the final approved calculation

parent_tasks.title: Confirm safe harbour assessment requirement and available safe harbours
checklist: Confirm whether safe harbour assessment is required
Confirm domestic-law adoption or administrative acceptance
Confirm whether safe harbour is available for the fiscal year
Confirm whether safe harbour is relevant for GIR, QDMTT, IIR, UTPR, provision, or payment

parent_tasks.title: Confirm tested jurisdiction and entity population
checklist: Reconcile population to GIR and group structure

parent_tasks.title: Collect safe harbour source data
checklist: Collect profit / loss before tax data

parent_tasks.title: Assess data qualification and run safe harbour tests
checklist: Run de minimis test, if applicable
Run simplified ETR test, if applicable
Run routine profits test, if applicable
Run QDMTT safe harbour assessment, if applicable
Run other local or simplified safe harbour tests, if relevant
Confirm continuity or re-entry restrictions, where relevant

parent_tasks.title: Document safe harbour conclusion and limitations
checklist: Document whether safe harbour can be relied on
Document whether safe harbour is used for local filing
Document whether safe harbour is used for GIR reporting
Document whether safe harbour is used for provision
Document whether safe harbour affects payment
Cross-reference to safe harbour claim / disclosure workflow

parent_tasks.title: Review and approve safe harbour assessment
Archive safe harbour assessment evidence pack
checklist: Confirm all test workpapers are stored
Confirm cross-references to filings are stored

items: Other safe harbour input support, where relevant

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if CbCR is not confirmed as qualifying
Alert if financial statements are not confirmed as qualified
Alert if safe harbour is being relied on before approval
Alert if safe harbour position differs between GIR and local return

parent_tasks.title: Confirm safe harbour claim or disclosure requirement
checklist: Confirm whether safe harbour is being claimed, disclosed, or merely assessed

Confirm whether disclosure is mandatory or optional
Confirm whether local election is required

parent_tasks.title: Confirm filing location and disclosure route
checklist: Confirm disclosure location: GIR, QDMTT return, IIR return, UTPR return, combined return, notification, or local report
Confirm whether disclosure affects payment or calculation requirement

parent_tasks.title: Confirm claim scope
checklist: Confirm whether claim scope matches approved assessment

parent_tasks.title: Validate claim against approved assessment
checklist: Confirm approved safe harbour assessment exists
Cross-check disclosure against GIR / local return data
Confirm failed tests are not claimed
Confirm restrictions or limitations are reflected

Review and approve safe harbour disclosure
Submit safe harbour disclosure
checklist: Submit disclosure as part of relevant filing
Link disclosure to relevant filing workflow

parent_tasks.title: Monitor challenge or support request
checklist: Link to enquiry workflow if required
Link to amendment workflow if claim is corrected

items: Relevant return section / GIR field mapping
Disclosure location support: GIR, QDMTT, IIR, UTPR, combined return, notification or local report
Payment / calculation impact support, where relevant

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if claim is being made without approved assessment
Alert if disclosure field conflicts with safe harbour conclusion
Alert if local election is required to claim safe harbour
Alert if safe harbour affects payment or return requirement

parent_tasks.title: Identify available elections and legal requirements
checklist: Identify available Pillar 2 elections for the jurisdiction and fiscal year
Confirm whether election is annual, multi-year, irrevocable, revocable, or subject to lock-in
Confirm whether election is made in GIR, local return, notification, or separate form

parent_tasks.title: Confirm affected entities, jurisdictions and periods
checklist: Confirm whether election applies at group, jurisdiction or entity level
Confirm whether election affects future years
Confirm whether election interacts with safe harbours or QDMTT

parent_tasks.title: Assess financial, tax and compliance impact
Prepare recommendation and obtain election approval
checklist: Obtain board, tax officer or authorised signatory approval, if required

parent_tasks.title: Record election and prepare filing disclosure
checklist: Prepare disclosure for GIR or local return
Prepare separate election form, if required

parent_tasks.title: Submit election or disclose in filing
checklist: Submit election, if separate filing is required
Include election in relevant return or GIR
Store submitted election or filed disclosure

parent_tasks.title: Track lock-in, expiry, renewal or revocation
checklist: Roll forward election status to future years

items: Legal source extract or local adviser confirmation
Safe harbour or QDMTT interaction support

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if election deadline is earlier than return deadline

Alert if election affects more than one jurisdiction

parent_tasks.title: Assess amendment trigger and legal correction requirement
checklist: Identify trigger: internal error, tax authority rejection, GIR status message, portal validation error, amended source data, adviser correction, assessment, or restructuring update

Confirm whether amendment is required, optional, or not required

parent_tasks.title: Confirm affected entities, jurisdictions, periods and filings
checklist: Confirm affected return, report, notification, payment, registration or disclosure
Confirm whether other jurisdictions are affected
Confirm whether group model requires update

parent_tasks.title: Assess error type and tax impact
checklist: Classify issue as data, calculation, entity scope, filing route, XML / portal format, payment, or technical interpretation

checklist: Update return, XML, notification, disclosure, or payment instruction

parent_tasks.title: Review and approve amended position

checklist: Submit refund or offset request, if required
Link to payment workflow, if required

parent_tasks.title: Monitor acceptance and update root-cause log

Required / optional / not required amendment conclusion

alerts_and_conditional_deviations: Alert if amendment deadline is imminent
Alert if amendment affects multiple filings or jurisdictions
Alert if additional payment may be due
Alert if safe harbour claim may be invalidated

checklist: Confirm whether request is formal or informal

obligations.obligation_type: Entity change / acquisition / disposal / short-period review
